title: RENTAL ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: NORTHWEST PILOT PROJECT RENTAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides eviction prevention (includes rental assistance if future income can be verified and subject to availability), relocation, and deposit assistance for older adults. Assistance is limited due to the availability of funding and is not guaranteed. Households can receive assistance once every two years. 1430 SW Broadway Suite 200 Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: -Household must contain one member at least 55 years old -Household must reside in Multnomah County or be homeless -Household must not contain any minor children under 18 years old -Household not currently in subsidized or Section 8 housing -Household must have a plan for resuming rent payments and not owe more than 2 months of past due rent -Household must meet income requirements; priority for those making 20% Median Family Income (MFI) or below Focus is on serving older adults with health concerns or disabilities or who have very low income, language barriers, no support system, or other barriers to housing Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 227-5605 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 227-5605 Housing Assessments Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call and leave a detailed voicemail when accepting appointments. Due to high call volume it may take up to 10 business days to receive a callback. People may call at any time to listen to the automated message. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the corner of SW Broadway and Clay Street. Metered parking only. TriMet buses and MAX train within 2 blocks. Services: Rent Payment Assistance * Older Adults Rental Deposit Assistance * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING RESOURCES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NORTHWEST PILOT PROJECT
